final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings with a representasjonspunkt in the municipality

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) within the municipality extent

4.description: get 200-year flood-zone polygons (flomareal) within the municipality extent

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons

6.description: find buildings (from step5) that also intersect flood-zone polygons

7.description: collapse to one row per building (bygningid)
